mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workplace Injury Claims in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mark Talley at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workplace Injury Claims serving Ogden. Mark has been a Utah workers compensation specialist since 2007, and works as an advocate for our injured Spanish-speaking clients. Mark and his assistants speak fluent Spanish, lending a voice to our community no matter which language they speak. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Mark Talley handle Workplace Injury Claims cases in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Mark Talley at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workplace Injury Claims and serves clients in Ogden and surrounding areas.
